messages.content: # Here is how to fix *Checksum Failed*

# Checksum Failed *always* means your files are different from the files used by the server. This causes it to not match, and you get kicked.
> **Follow every step below all at once to prevent weird issues from happening**

## Step 1:
> **Ensure your system meets requirements**
> 
> * You must have **more than 16GB of RAM**
> * You must be using **DDR4 or newer RAM**
> 
> Using **DDR3 RAM** or **only 16GB total** will cause checksum errors
# *If you have __16GB of RAM__ or less, follow steps __2.1__ → __2.5__, otherwise, skip to Step 3

## Step 2.1
> On the start button right click and select system

## Step 2.2
> On your right in related setting click on Advanced system settings

## Step 2.3
> In the advanced tab performance case click on settings

## Step 2.4
> Advanced tab go in virtual memory and select change
> Untick the case "Automatically manage paging file size"
> Select your faster drive with at least 16gb of free space
> Select Custom size and write 16000 in initial size and maximum size and don't forget to click on Set

## Step 2.5
> Select Ok and restart your PC

## Step 3:
> **Reinstall all cars**
### Prerequisite:
> You **must** use **7-Zip**, **not WinRAR**.
> Download and install 7-Zip for free: https://www.7-zip.org/
### Reinstall:
> 1. Navigate to your <#1322235675239645184> and open the "content" folder > then rename `cars` to `old_cars`
> 2. Then proceed to <#1322222319518748692>
> 3. Reinstall all cars **manually** following: <#1440122305861652520>

## Step 4:
> **If still failing, delete and reinstall the affected tracks manually**
> 
> Delete / Reinstall: <#1457475437809631416> 
> Track Download:<#1412564819785027695>

## Step 5:
-# Only if the above fix does not work
> Close all background apps, including discord and connect again.
